props.variant: Visual style — default, solid, border, shadow, gradient, flat, or relief.
props.color: Accent color — a theme name (primary, success…) or any CSS color.
props.type: Semantic shortcut (success, info, warning, error) that sets a color and a leading icon.
props.title: Title text (shorthand for the `title` slot).
props.text: Body text (shorthand for the default slot).
props.icon: Leading icon name, or false to hide the type icon.
props.closable: Shows a dismiss button that hides the alert.
props.progress: 0–100 value for the bottom progress bar.
props.hiddenContent: Boolean (use `v-model:hidden-content`) — makes the title collapse/expand the content.

events.update:modelValue: Emitted when the alert is dismissed.
events.update:hiddenContent: Emitted when the content is collapsed or expanded.

slots.title: The alert title.
slots.footer: A footer row, typically for actions.
slots.page-1: Content for page 1 (add page-2, page-3, … for more).
